sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, subject VARCHAR(255), predicate VARCHAR(255), object VARCHAR(255), valmode INT);
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, subject, predicate, object, valmode) VALUES (1, 'http://example.org/s1', 'http://example.org/p1', 'http://example.org/o1', 0);
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, subject, predicate, object, valmode) VALUES (2, 'http://example.org/s2', 'http://example.org/p2', NULL, 1);
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, subject, predicate, object, valmode) VALUES (3, NULL, 'http://example.org/p3', 'http://example.org/o3', 0);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_TTL2HASH((SELECT subject FROM rdf_data WHERE id = 1)) AS result;
SELECT * FROM rdf_data WHERE valmode IN (SELECT (CASE WHEN id > 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) FROM rdf_data);
SELECT subject, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY subject) AS subject_count FROM rdf_data GROUP BY subject HAVING subject_count > 1;
SELECT * FROM rdf_data WHERE object IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rdf_data rd2 WHERE rd2.id = rdf_data.id AND rd2.valmode = 1);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_TTL2HASH(bif:eval('SELECT subject FROM rdf_data WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM rdf_data)')) AS dynamic_result;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_TTL2HASH((SELECT subject FROM rdf_data WHERE predicate IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1)) AS first_non_null_subject;
